summary: The task is complete in substance. The Prisma/SQLite persistence foundation is present, scoped to endpoint/tool data, seeded idempotently, documented in docs/generated/db-schema.md, and the recorded mandatory gates all passed. The implementation maps to endpoint-tool-management.md and does not broaden into UI, runtime, auth, or reset behavior.
satisfied_exit_criteria: npm run db:prepare prepares SQLite runtime state through Prisma migrations, client generation, and seed execution.
db:prepare repeatability is covered by tests/unit/db-prepare.test.ts, which runs the command twice against an isolated SQLite database and asserts singular seed rows.
The schema represents endpoint names, titles/descriptions, enabled state, parameters, response cases, default responses, delete codes, timestamps, and basic failure config fields.
docs/generated/db-schema.md matches the implemented Endpoint, EndpointParam, ResponseCase models and seed defaults.
Recorded required checks passed: npm run db:prepare, npm run test:unit, and npm run verify.
